info.title: AI-powered Purchase Intelligence System API
info.description: Backend service for ingestion, OCR, LLM extraction, and validation of paper bills.

post.description:
Registers a new user, hashes their password, seeds initial default categories,
and returns a JWT access token.
Standard OAuth2 Form-based login endpoint. Used by Swagger UI authorize lock.
JSON-based login endpoint. Ideal for REST clients and frontend integrations.
Generates a password reset token and simulates sending a reset link to the terminal.
Verifies a reset token and updates the user's password.

get.description:
Returns the organization settings for the current logged-in user.
Returns default values if no custom settings exist yet in the database.

put.description: Upserts (saves or updates) organization settings for the current user.

get.description:
Returns the user profile display preferences.
Returns default values if no custom settings exist yet in the database.

put.description: Upserts (saves or updates) user profile display preferences for the current user.

post.description:
Ingests a paper bill image or PDF, runs the preprocessing & OCR pipeline,
extracts structured data using the LLM Vision model, and validates it.
Uses temporary files which are deleted immediately after processing.

Concurrently processes a list of uploaded bill images/PDFs using asyncio.gather.
Returns a list of processing results.

Saves validated JSON input into MongoDB under the current user's account.
Performs upserts on user-specific products and dealers, writes the processing log, and stores the bill.

get.description: Returns all bills stored in the system under the current user's account.

schema.title: Response Get All Bills Bills Get

get.description: Returns a single bill by its unique ID, restricted to the owner.

put.description: Updates specific fields of an existing bill document owned by the current user.

get.description: Returns all categories stored in the system under the user's account.

schema.title: Response Get All Categories Categories Get

post.description: Creates a new category in the database for the authenticated user.

put.description: Updates a category's name and cascades changes to associated products and bills for the current user.

delete.description: Deletes a category and resets references in products and bills to empty string (limited to user).

get.description: Returns overall dashboard metrics and chronological purchase summaries.
Returns analytics profiles for all active dealers.

schema.title: Response Get All Dealers Profiles Analytics Dealers Get

get.description: Compares side-by-side transaction metrics and calculates savings opportunities between two dealers.
Returns detailed analytics profile for a specific dealer.
Returns lists of top most purchased, highest spending, and least purchased products.
Analyzes prices for the same product across all supplying dealers to find the cheapest option.

parameters.name: product_name

schema.description: Name of the product to compare across suppliers
schema.title: Product Name

parameters.description: Name of the product to compare across suppliers

get.description: Returns spending, quantities, and MoM growth metrics grouped by product category.
Returns individual purchase stats, min/max price, last purchase, and frequency for a product.
Generates monthly average price trends and moving averages for a product.

parameters.name: product_name

schema.description: Product name to check price history
schema.title: Product Name

parameters.description: Product name to check price history

parameters.name: dealer_name

schema.description: Optional dealer name to filter trend history
schema.title: Dealer Name

parameters.description: Optional dealer name to filter trend history

get.description: Generates price history trends of a product mapped per individual dealer.

parameters.name: product_name

schema.description: Product name to check price history per dealer
schema.title: Product Name

parameters.description: Product name to check price history per dealer

get.description: Generates chronological transaction trends grouped daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, and yearly.
Identifies overpayment margins and total potential savings if shifting to the cheapest supplier.
Extracts business insights such as frequently purchased together items, fast growing items, and price alerts.
Generates future spend, quantity, and price trend estimates for next month using the active forecaster.
Exposes structured raw JSON context payloads for a downstream AI chat assistant to consume.

parameters.name: query_type

schema.description: Type of query context to build (e.g. cheapest_dealer, monthly_spend, dealer_comparison, price_increase, negotiation_targets)
schema.title: Query Type

parameters.description: Type of query context to build (e.g. cheapest_dealer, monthly_spend, dealer_comparison, price_increase, negotiation_targets)

parameters.name: dealer_a

schema.description: First dealer name (required for dealer_comparison context)
schema.title: Dealer A

parameters.description: First dealer name (required for dealer_comparison context)

parameters.name: dealer_b

schema.description: Second dealer name (required for dealer_comparison context)
schema.title: Dealer B

parameters.description: Second dealer name (required for dealer_comparison context)

get.description: Simple API health check endpoint.

context_data.title: Context Data
context_data.description: Structured JSON payload prepared for AI agent ingestion

date.title: Date
date.description: Invoice date (format: YYYY-MM-DD or raw extracted date)

items.title: Items
items.description: List of items in the bill

category.title: Category
category.description: Category for the entire bill and all its products

unit.title: Unit
unit.description: Unit of measurement (e.g., kg, pcs, box)

price_difference.title: Price Difference
price_difference.description: Average unit price difference for commonly purchased products

savings_opportunity.title: Savings Opportunity
savings_opportunity.description: Potential savings if buying from the cheaper dealer

future_price_trend.title: Future Price Trend
future_price_trend.description: Future price projections key-indexed by product name

frequently_purchased_together.title: Frequently Purchased Together
frequently_purchased_together.description: Association rules / items commonly bought on the same invoice

percentage_increase.title: Percentage Increase
percentage_increase.description: Increase from start of period to end

percentage_decrease.title: Percentage Decrease
percentage_decrease.description: Decrease from start of period to end

moving_average.title: Moving Average
moving_average.description: Overall average price across the trend period

potential_savings.title: Potential Savings
potential_savings.description: Potential savings calculated based on total quantity purchased

user.title: User
user.description: Basic details of the logged in user
